improvements: Revokes the object URL after the click to avoid memory leaks
Sanitizes the filename and auto-appends the correct extension from the MIME type
Works with any ImageDataURL producer, not just the camera (image upload, cropper, etc.)
Could add a Web Share API fallback for iOS Safari where programmatic download is restricted
lineage: Pairs with camera-capture-definitive (consumes its ImageDataURL output)
From-scratch download/save logic minted to fill the missing save-to-device half
Tuned (AI): Added optional `photo` prop to PhotoDownloaderApp; uses it as the photo when provided, otherwise falls back to the file-picker behavior. (+$0.0783 claude-opus-4-8)
